# My Agent

This is a description of my agent.

## Configuration

```yaml
name: My Agent
version: '1.0'
actions:
  - name: Action 1
    type: type1
  - name: Action 2
    type: type2
```

## Usage

To use the agent, you can integrate it into your workflow as follows:

```
# Example of how to integrate
integrate_with: My Agent
```

## Notes

- Ensure to update the agent regularly.
- Check the configuration for any errors.
